channel.title: SPL - Fremont Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Fremont Branch

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 10:15 AM

Location: Fremont Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Write at the Fremont Branch
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Fremont Branch

Join author Alma García for a free drop-in writing circle for all genres of writing.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.
